title: Paraprasophyllum argillaceum
taxonomy: Paraprasophyllum argillaceum is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Paraprasophyllum within the subtribe Galeolinae. The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, comprising over 30,000 species. Paraprasophyllum argillaceum's classification is further categorized into the order Asparagales, which includes various flowering plant families. The classification of Paraprasophyllum argillaceum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchids and flowering plants.
